candidates.question: First find the median of the numbers 3, 45, 54, 50, 71, and 39. Then reduce that median by 5%. Finally, multiply the reduced value by 17.
Calculate the area of a 51 by 11 rectangle. Then count how many values in the set [71, 69, 9, 88, 43, 16] exceed that area. Finally, find the absolute difference between that count and 282.
Compute the volume of a cylinder with radius 8 and height 19. Then decrease that volume by 5%. Finally, round the decreased volume to the nearest whole number.

Determine how many days it takes to deliver a package over 1723 kilometers at a rate of 600 kilometers per day. Then divide that number of days by 6, taking only the whole part. Finally, round that result to one decimal place.

Find the area of a square with a side length of 8. Then count how many numbers in the list [93, 34, 11, 59, 2, 32, 13, 67] are less than that area. Using that count, determine how many units remain in stock after selling 29 of them.
